children.text: have a life expectancy 10 years less than any other ethnic group in the State of Hawaii;
rank lowest on 9 of 11 standard health indicies for all ethnic groups in Hawaii;1So in original. Probably should be “indices”.1
are often unaware of social services and do not know how to go about seeking such assistance; and
live in poverty at a rate of 34 percent.
